zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Peter de Eyton III於1247年出生在英國史洛普爾艾頓 武朋 馮 維亞爾德 波斯時，他的父親William De Eyton62歲，母親Lady Margery Matilda De Pedwardine23歲。他於1273年之前與Margery of Hulme在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1311年5月21日之前在英國英格蘭史洛普爾艾頓 武朋 馮 維亞爾德 波斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Peter de Eyton III于1247年出生在英国史洛普爾艾頓 武朋 馮 維亞爾德 波斯时，他的父亲William De Eyton62岁，母亲Lady Margery Matilda De Pedwardine23岁。他于1273年之前与Margery of Hulme在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1311年5月21日之前在英国英格兰史洛普爾艾頓 武朋 馮 維亞爾德 波斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Eyton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Eyton (Shrops) or Eaton (Cheshire, Leics, Staffs), or Eaton Bray (Beds), Cold Eaton or Long Eaton (Derbys).

variants.name: Ayton
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Ayton (North Yorkshire) or Ayton (Berwickshire). The former is derived from Old Norse á ‘river, stream’ + tūn ‘farmstead’. The later takes its name from the River Eye (likely from Old English ēa ‘river, stream’) + tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Peter de Eyton III was born in 1247, in Eyton upon the Weald Moors, Shropshire, England, his father, William De Eyton, was 62 and his mother, Lady Margery Matilda De Pedwardine, was 23. He married Margery of Hulme before 1273, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died before 21 May 1311, in Eyton upon the Weald Moors, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Peter d’Eyton III est né en 1247, à Eyton upon the Weald Moors, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, William De Eyton, avait 62 ans et sa mère, Lady Margery Matilda De Pedwardine, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Margery of Hulme avant 1273, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 21 mai 1311, à Eyton upon the Weald Moors, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.Eyton on Severn, Shropshire, West Midlan: 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 이턴 업 테 위드 무르스

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Peter de Eyton III(이)가 1247년 영국 슈럽실르 이턴 업 테 위드 무르스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William De Eyton(은)는 62세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margery Matilda De Pedwardine(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1273년 이전 영국에서 Margery of Hulme(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1311년 5월 21일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 이턴 업 테 위드 무르스에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Peter de Eyton III родился в 1247 г. в местности эитон упон т вилд мурс, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William De Eyton было 62 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Margery Matilda De Pedwardine, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery of Hulme перед 1273 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер перед 21 май 1311 г. в местности эитон упон т вилд мурс, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Peter de Eyton III nació en 1247, en Eyton upon the Weald Moors, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William De Eyton, tenía 62 años y su mamá, Lady Margery Matilda De Pedwardine, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Margery of Hulme antes de 1273, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija.
